properties.displayName: KEV Framework - KEV-Remediate Logic App Run Failure
properties.description: Alerts when a KEV-Remediate Logic App run fails or is cancelled. A failure means a KEV incident was raised but not remediated - the CVE stays open until manually addressed. Cancelled status from the incident-source validation guard is also surfaced so investigators can see attempted unauthorized triggers.
properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.LOGIC'
| where Resource =~ '{{kevRemediateLogicAppName}}'
| where Category == 'WorkflowRuntime'
| where status_s in ('Failed', 'Cancelled')
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Workflow = Resource,
    Status = status_s,
    RunId = correlation_clientTrackingId_s,
    StartTime = startTime_t,
    EndTime = endTime_t,
    ErrorCode = code_s,
    ErrorMessage = error_s
| extend
    IsLikelyTamperingAttempt = ErrorCode == 'UnauthorizedTriggerSource'
